description: A vertically stacked three-panel slogan graphic from the U.S. Department of Labor. Each of the three horizontal panels shows a desaturated, grainy black-and-white photograph of derelict industrial landscapes: the top panel shows an abandoned factory complex with two tall brick smokestacks across a barren field; the middle panel shows a rusting elevated water tower beside a large multi-story brick mill or warehouse; the bottom panel shows a low industrial building beside disused railroad tracks and utility poles. The images carry film-grain, dust specks and scratches and are dark in tone. Bold white sans-serif capital text is overlaid centered across the three panels in sequence, reading 'GLOBALISM' / 'HAS' / 'FAILED.' top to bottom.
